summary: Complete testing of Budget Labor Forecast module. All 8 backend tests PASSED. All 6 new API endpoints verified working. Frontend BudgetForecastPanel renders correctly in ProjectFinancialPage showing Budget Health section with progress bars and Earned Value Analysis with CPI/SPI gauges.
seed_data_creation: 3 activity budgets created by pytest: Довършителни/Шпакловка (5000), Земни/Изкопи (10000), Инсталации/Електро (8000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Labor Forecast module fully tested. Key data-testids: budget-forecast-panel, budget-forecast-section, project-financial-page. BudgetForecastPanel shows at bottom of ProjectFinancialPage (/projects/{id}/financial). No work sessions match activity types yet so burn=0 which is expected. Earned Value shows 'At Risk' status because CPI/SPI=0 (no progress recorded).

GET /api/activity-budgets/{id}/forecast.note: Returns man_days, min_days, min_people, avg_daily_wage correctly. Formula: man_days = labor_budget / avg_daily_wage / coefficient

GET /api/activity-budgets/{id}/burn.note: Returns actual_cost, actual_hours, burn_pct, on_track from work_sessions

GET /api/projects/{id}/budget-health.note: Aggregated burn across all activity budgets with status per activity

GET /api/projects/{id}/earned-value.note: Returns BAC, EV, AC, PV, CPI, SPI, EAC, ETC, VAC, progress_pct, status

POST /api/projects/{id}/activity-budgets.note: New fields (coefficient, planned_people_per_day, planned_target_days) persisted correctly

GET /api/progress-warnings/{id}.note: Returns warnings including budget burn warnings

Budget Health section.note: Shows total_budget, total_spent, remaining, burn_pct with progress bar

Activities list with burn %.note: 3 activities displayed with spent/budget and 0% badges

Earned Value Analysis section.note: Shows CPI, SPI, Progress with color coding

EV metrics (BAC, EV, AC, PV, EAC, VAC).note: All metrics displayed in grid format

Status badge (At Risk).note: Red 'At Risk' badge shown when CPI/SPI < 0.8
